name: chain_acquisition_marketing_cro_app__seekin
method: [ACQUISITION] Marketing CRO App - Seeking Honest Feedback

stages.task: Scrape r/SideProject weekly for posts tagged [ACQUISITION] or containing 'CRO', 'conversion', 'landing page', 'A/B test', 'seeking feedback'
Score each post: acquisition target (has price/valuation), feedback mine (has user complaints = feature gaps for pagescorer), distribution op (upvoted post we can reply to with pagescorer link)
Route: acquisition targets → LEDGER/APP_CLONE_OPPORTUNITIES.csv | feedback mines → pagescorer backlog | distribution ops → CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ as reply drafts
